LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BELINDA QUINTANILLA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED WHETHER DEFENDANT'S WORKERS COMPENSATION COVERAGE LAPSED, THEREBY CAUSING DEFENDANT'S LICENSE TO BE SUSPENDED DURING PERFORMANCE OF ITS CONTRACT WITH PLAINTIFF. SEE LORANGER V. JONES (2010) 184 CAL APP 4TH 847. (WINSTON DECL. AT PARAGRAPH 6, EXHIBIT E.) PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-16-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BELINDA QUINTANILLA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION . Appearances: Robert S. Jaret of Jaret & Jaret (455.1010) for plaintiff and moving party; Lori M. Kidd of Hardiman & Carroll (248.3930) for defendant and responding party Planart. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. Triable issue of fact raised whether defendant's workers compensation coverage lapsed, thereby causing defendant's license to be suspended during performance of its contract with plaintiff. See Loranger v. Jones (2010) 184 Cal App 4th 847. (Winston decl. at paragraph 6, Exhibit E.) Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2010 Off Calendar

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF BELINDA QUINTANILLA, Motion for Leave of Court to File First Amended Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for leave of court to file first amended complaint is granted. Request for sanctions denied. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
